backup_page_desc: Save your database to the server or download it locally. If anything goes wrong, restore any backup in one click.

restore_backup_warning: this will replace ALL current data and settings. A safety backup is created automatically before restoration.

batch_description:
This utility will optimize all images in the selected directory and its subdirectories.
Optimization reduces image size and/or resizes them to make your pages load faster.
Backups are created automatically and removed if optimization succeeds.
